name: Cranberry Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl, beat eggs.
3. Add orange juice and oil; stir into the dry ingredients just until moistened (batter will be lumpy).
4. Fold in cranberries and pecans.
5. Spoon batter into 12 greased or paper-lined muffin cups (cups will be almost full).
6. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from pan to cool on a wire rack.
8. Freeze muffins in freezer bags and thaw as needed.
Makes: 1 dozen
